details: The agent correctly retrieved all three pieces of information: (1) open issue count of 8,780 from the totalCount field, not the page size; (2) exactly 5 merged PRs with correct titles and authors, properly filtered by merged_at timestamps from the closed PRs list; (3) latest release tag v2026.3.13-1. The merged PRs match the actual merged_at timestamps in the data (#34222, #37080, #40126, #51260, #27727 in descending order).
